channel.title: Robotics on Shiraz
channel.description: Recent content in Robotics on Shiraz

item.title: VLA Models
item.description: A review of the basic concepts that go into the design and training of VLA models.

item.title: Representing Spatial Velocities
item.description: I’ve been going through Russ Tedrake’s notes on robotics, which got me thinking about their so-called monogram notation. The result of this deliberation was a new notation for spatial velocities that bridges the gap between abstract Lie groups and their applications to robotics and computer graphics.
